title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 05 2022
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 05 2022
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, January 05 2022
summary:
Main
Little change in the crude market at the start of the year, rates have remained steady although timecharter activity has been quiet so far. The clean market has been quiet with limited enquiry although short term rates have moved up slightly. The average rate for an MR is estimated to be $13,350/pdpr.
